---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
---
<style>
.html-widget {
    width: 910px !important;
    height: 340px !important;
}
body { margin: 0; }
</style>

```{r, include=FALSE}
# # load libraries and test data
library(here)
library(purrr)
library(grDevices)


source(here("MOSAIC", "charts", "data_prep.R"))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

```

```{r}
# Data prep
groups_to_highlight <- c("nh_asian", "pacisl", "swana")

chart_df <- low_bw_rc_reshape %>%
  mutate(
    rate_label = round(rate, 1),
    count_label = format(count, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE),
    hex_color = if_else(subgroup %in% groups_to_highlight, rc_magenta, rc_grey),
    fixed_y = 1
    )

# Direction of best?
best <- "min"
reverse_x_arg <- ifelse(best=="min", TRUE, FALSE)

# Total average
total_avg <- chart_df %>%
  filter(subgroup=="total") %>%
  select(rate) %>%
  pull()

```

```{r}
# Chart Text

title <- "Low Birthweight Births (%)"
# Perhaps no subtitle to maximize chart space
# subtitle <- "Stress from discrimination and living in neighborhoods with limited employment opportunities, abandoned housing, crime, and limited resources are associated with adverse birth outcomes, like low birthweight."

subtitle <- ""

# caption text
data_source <- "US Department of Health and Human Services, Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), National Center for Health Statistics, Division of Vital Statistics, CDC WONDER Online Database (2016-2023)"
data_description <- "The number of infants born weighing less than 2,500 grams or about 5 lbs 8 oz per 100 live births by race/ethnicity of birthing parent. Estimates for racial groups with fewer than ten births or areas with fewer than 100,000 people were excluded to protect privacy. SWANA data includes only foreign-born birthing parents."
methodology_link <- "<a href='https://catalystcalifornia.github.io/RaceCounts/Methodology/Indicator_Methodology_CountyState.html' target='_blank'>Full Methodology</a>"
groups_to_highlight <- c("nh_asian", "pacisl", "swana")


```


```{r}
# Build chart

hc <- hchart(chart_df,
             type = "bubble",
             hcaes(x=rate, y=fixed_y, color=hex_color)) %>%
  hc_title(
    text = "Low Birthweight Births (%)", 
    align = "left", 
    style = list(fontWeight = "bold", color = "#000000")) %>%
  hc_subtitle(text=subtitle,
              align="left") %>%
  hc_caption(
    text = paste("<b>About the data:", data_source, "</b><br>", data_description, methodology_link),
    useHTML = TRUE,
    align = "left"
  ) %>%
  # Remove Y-axis elements and add the thick black background track line
  hc_yAxis(
    min = 0.5,
    max = 1.5,
    gridLineWidth = 0,
    lineWidth = 0,
    labels = list(enabled = FALSE),
    title = list(text = ""),
    plotLines = list(
      list(
        value = 1, # Must match 'fixed_y' data value
        color = "#000000",
        width = 10, # Adjust thickness of the black track line
        zIndex = 1  # Keeps line behind the bubbles
      )
    )
  ) %>% 
  hc_xAxis(
    title = list(text = ""),
    reversed = reverse_x_arg,
    gridLineWidth = 0,
    tickLength = 0,
    lineWidth = 0,
    labels = list(format = "{value}%", style = list(fontSize = "12px", color = "#000000")),
    # Add the vertical target dashed line
    plotLines = list(
      list(
        value = total_avg, 
        color = rc_yellow,
        width = 2,
        dashStyle = "Dash",
        zIndex = 4
      )
    )
  ) %>% 
  hc_legend(enabled=FALSE) %>%
  # Style the bubble markers globally and map labels
  hc_plotOptions(
    bubble = list(
      zIndex = 3,
      minSize = 15,
      maxSize = 45,
      colorByPoint=TRUE,
      fillOpacity = 1,
      marker = list(
        lineColor = "#333333",
        lineWidth = 1,
        fillOpacity = 1
      ),
      dataLabels = list(
        enabled = TRUE,
        format = "{point.label_text}",
        style = list(color = "#ffffff", textOutline = "none", fontSize = "11px")
      ),
      tooltip = list(
        enabled = TRUE,
        useHTML = TRUE,
        backgroundColor = rc_grey,
        headerFormat = "",  # Remove default header
        pointFormat = paste(
          "<div style='padding: 20px; line-height: normal; max-width: 220px;'>",
          "<div style='font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 20px; text-align: left;'>{point.subgroup}</div><br><br>",
          "<div style='padding: 15px; margin: 8px 0; border-radius: 4px; text-align: center;'>",
          "<div style='font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 15px;'>{point.rate_label}</div>",
          "<div style='font-size: 13px;'>%</div><br><br>",
          "<div style='font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px;'>{point.count_label}</div>",
          "<div style='font-size: 13px;'>low birthweight births</div>",
          "</div>",
          "</div>")
    )
  )) %>%
  hc_add_theme(custom_theme) %>% 
  hc_responsive(
    rules = list(
      list(
        # Omit data_description on small screens
        condition = list(maxWidth = 768),
        chartOptions = list(
          caption = 
            list(
              text = paste("<b>About the data:</b>", data_source,
                         "<a href='...' target='_blank'>Full Methodology</a>")
            )
        )
      )
    )
  )


# Wrap with constrained width
htmltools::tagList(
  htmltools::tags$div(
    class = "chart-wrapper",
    style = "max-width: 1200px; width: 100%; margin: 0 auto;",
    htmltools::tags$div(
      class = "chart-container",
      style = "height: auto; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #ccc;",
      hc
    )
  ),
  htmltools::tags$script(HTML("
    function resizeChart() {
      if (typeof Highcharts !== 'undefined' && Highcharts.charts.length > 0) {
        Highcharts.charts.forEach(function(chart) {
          if (chart) {
            var wrapper = document.querySelector('.chart-wrapper');
            if (wrapper) {
              var targetWidth = wrapper.offsetWidth - 40;
              chart.setSize(targetWidth, null, false);
            }
          }
        });
      }
    }
    
    setTimeout(resizeChart, 100);
    window.addEventListener('resize', resizeChart);
  "))
)
  

```
